---
title: "Selena Esteves"
subtitle: "Masters Student"
description: "Masters student interested in interventions for women's sexual desire, the relationship between sexual dysfunctions and anxiety/depression, and research synthesis methods."
image: avatar.jpg
group: grad
order: 1
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
![](avatar.jpg)

# Graduate Student Name {.name}

::: {.subtitle}
M.Sc. Student | Department of Psychology | Western University
:::

:::

## About

I am a Masters student in Western's Clinical Science and Psychopathology program, who joined the MaRSS Lab in 2024. My research interests centre around women's sexual health and wellness, namely, interventions for women's sexual desire. My current work focuses on using advanced meta-analytic methods to synthesize evidence on interventions for women's sexual dysfunctions, as well as assessing the relationship between sexual dysfunctions and mental health (e.g., depression and anxiety). 
When not making pretty graphs in R, Selena can be found knitting, at the farmer's market, or watching Survivor.

## Research Interests

- Women's sexual dysfunctions
- Research synthesis methods
- Multidimensionality of sexual dysfunctions, and mood/anxiety disorders

## Education

- **M.Sc.** — Western University
- **B.Sc.** — McMaster University (Biology and Psychology)

## Contact

- {{< fa envelope >}} [sesteve@uwo.ca](mailto:sesteve@uwo.ca)
- {{< fa brands google-scholar >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MJBFkDsAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)
- {{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/spesteves)
